scripts.check:repo:validate: npm run build --workspace=packages/ddd-spec-cli && npm run repo:cli --workspace=packages/ddd-spec-cli -- validate --config apps/ddd-spec-viewer/ddd-spec.config.yaml
scripts.check:repo:build: npm run build --workspace=packages/ddd-spec-cli && npm run repo:cli --workspace=packages/ddd-spec-cli -- build --config apps/ddd-spec-viewer/ddd-spec.config.yaml
scripts.check:repo:goldens: npm run build --workspace=packages/ddd-spec-cli && npm run repo:cli --workspace=packages/ddd-spec-cli -- build --config packages/ddd-spec-core/test-fixtures/cross-context/ddd-spec.config.yaml

scripts.ops:repo:viewer: npm run build --workspace=packages/ddd-spec-cli && npm run repo:cli --workspace=packages/ddd-spec-cli -- serve --config apps/ddd-spec-viewer/ddd-spec.config.yaml --
